author: y4rr
content: Observation: vision_manual_seed_seeded_determinism was already failing when more than one test ran concurrently. The splitmix64 RNG uses a global counter that any parallel test call to random_f64() increments, so vision_manual_seed(42) followed by apply() produces different counter offsets depending on what other tests ran between the two seeded calls. This is pre-existing. The moment tests make it more likely by consuming more counter increments. Resolution: run conformance_vision_transforms with --test-threads=1, or note this as a documented thread-safety limitation of the global RNG.
